title: Flea Treatment in Amityville, Long Island | $350 – $650
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in Amityville, Long Island. Fast, effective flea extermination for homes and businesses. Pricing $350 – $650. Same-day service available.
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Amityville home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services throughout Amityville and the greater Long Island area. Our licensed exterminators use proven methods to eliminate fleas at every life stage, protecting your family and pets from these persistent pests.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving Amityville residents with safe, effective flea treatments. We offer same-day service, use pet-friendly products, and provide a satisfaction guarantee on all our work.
localContext: From the historic homes near Amityville Village to the waterfront properties along the Great South Bay, flea infestations can affect any Amityville residence. Our team is familiar with the unique pest challenges facing Long Island homeowners and tailors treatments to the specific needs of Amityville's diverse neighborhoods and building types.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Amityville?
faqs.answer: Our flea treatment services in Amityville range from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your property and the severity of the infestation. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Most customers see a significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours of treatment. Complete elimination typically occurs within 2-3 weeks as the treatment affects fleas at all life stages, including eggs and larvae. We include a follow-up visit to ensure complete eradication.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets and children when applied correctly. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours after application or until surfaces are completely dry, then they can safely return.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day flea treatment in Amityville?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer same-day and emergency flea treatment services throughout Amityville and Long Island. Fleas multiply rapidly, so we prioritize quick response times to prevent infestations from worsening. Call us before noon for potential same-day service.
